name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students
description: Scholarship for girl students admitted to technical diploma or degree courses.
benefit: Tuition fee assistance and incidental allowance as per AICTE rules.

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: Scholarship for specially-abled students in AICTE-approved technical courses.
benefit: Tuition fee support and incidental allowance.

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
description: Merit-cum-means scholarship for college and university students based on Class 12 performance.
benefit: Annual financial support for eligible undergraduate and postgraduate study.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
provider: Department of School Education and Literacy
description: Scholarship for meritorious students from economically weaker sections to reduce dropout after Class 8.
benefit: Annual scholarship amount as notified by the government.

name: PM YASASVI Post Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
provider: Department of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Post-matric support for OBC, EBC and DNT students under PM YASASVI.
benefit: Maintenance allowance and approved fee support as per scheme rules.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
provider: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Financial assistance for Scheduled Caste students studying after Class 10.
benefit: Maintenance allowance, compulsory fees, and other approved academic support.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Support for Scheduled Tribe students pursuing post-matric education.
benefit: Academic fees and maintenance allowance as per course group.

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
provider: Department of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Support for Scheduled Caste students studying in Classes 9 and 10.
benefit: Academic allowance as notified for day scholars and hostellers.

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students in Classes 9 and 10.
benefit: Monthly scholarship support for eligible day scholars and hostellers.

name: Telangana Overseas Scholarship
description: Financial assistance for eligible Telangana students pursuing higher education abroad.
benefit: Grant up to the amount notified by Telangana ePASS for overseas study.

name: Telangana Post Matric Scholarship
description: Fee reimbursement and scholarship support for eligible Telangana students.
benefit: Tuition fee reimbursement and maintenance support based on course/category.
